name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese and peanut butter in a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add whipped topping and powdered sugar, continuing to beat until smooth.
4. Spoon the filling into prepared crusts.
5. Cover and freeze for at least 8 hours.
6. Garnish with chocolate shavings if desired.
